metadata.title: Street Player (Dance Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:38.78] I'll never forget those aimless years
[00:42.36] Street sounds swirling through my mind
[00:46.89] Trouble was often in the air
[00:49.84] So we fought to forget our despair
[00:53.49] I'm a street player
[00:57.67] And I'll play you a song
[01:01.98] 'Cause you know, my heart & soul
[01:05.59] Will carry, carry on
[01:11.80] Carry on
[01:15.63] Carry on
[01:19.27] Carry on
[01:43.77] City life's the only way
[01:47.46] Street corners and billiard halls was our home away
[01:55.22] Lessons learned still help me today
[01:58.55] I'm a street player
[02:02.62] I've seen it all
[02:06.78] Hit men, thieves and many a brawl
[02:09.61] But as you see I still stand tall
[02:23.65] It was such a small space in time
[02:27.68] I never knew that I would find
[02:31.73] A musical path for all to see
[02:35.79] Anxiety into ecstasy
[02:42.16] I'm a street player
[02:45.16] I'm a street player
[02:48.81] I'm a street player
[02:52.78] I'm a street player
[02:58.03] 
[03:28.38] I'm a street player
[03:31.80] I've seen it all
[03:35.81] Hit men, thieves and many a brawl
[03:38.80] But as you see I still stand tall
[03:44.83] It was such a small space in time
[03:48.99] I never knew that I would find
